message:
chore(beads): sync issue tracker state

Update .beads/issues.jsonl with current issue statuses, new beads
from the Aegis Engine and replay system epics, and compaction-level
updates from ongoing development work. This reflects the evolving
task graph for the frankenterm project.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
